source.name: LTO-style dataset
source.language_note: English main text; Tagalog translation in parentheses

stem.en: When can a child be exempted to be sitted in a child restraint system?
stem.tl: Kailan maaaring hindi gumamit ng child restraint system ang isang bata?

choices.en: If the child will be late for a medical appointment
choices.tl: Kung ang bata ay mahuhuli sa kanyang iskedyul sa ospital

choices.en: If the child is going to school
choices.tl: Kung ang bata ay papunta sa eskwelahaan

choices.en: If the child requires immediate medical treatment
choices.tl: Kung ang bata ay nangangailangan ng agarang lunas o medical

stem.en: What are the three field sobriety tests?
stem.tl: Ano ang mga pagsusuri na ginagawa upang malaman kung positibo sa alak ang isang drayber?

choices.en: Eye test, walk and turn, one leg stand
choices.tl: Pag tsek sa mata, pag lakad at pagtayo sa isang paa

choices.en: Eye test, running straight, jumping rope
choices.tl: Pagtsek sa mata, diretsong pagtakbo, luksong lundag

choices.en: Reading and Comprehension Test, Singing the National Anthem and Drinking one liter of fresh water
choices.tl: Pagbabasa, pag-awit sa lupang hinirang at pag-inom ng isang litrong tubig

stem.en: How do you respond to a situation where you are approaching your garage to your right and you need to pass on a bike lane which is open, but a speeding SUV unexpectedly uses the bike lane to overtake you?
stem.tl: Paano ka tutugon sa isang sitwasyon kung saan papalapit ka sa garahe sa kanan at kailangan mong tumawid sa bike lane, nang isang mabilis na SUV ay hindi inaasahan na ginagamit ang bike lane upang mag overtake sayo?

choices.en: Give way to the speeding SUV
choices.tl: Magbigay daan sa mabilis na SUV

choices.en: Give way to motorists on the left
choices.tl: Magbigay daan sa motorista sa kaliwa

stem.en: What is the penalty if a driver is found to have a fake or counterfeit license?
stem.tl: Ano ang kaakibat na kaparusahan kung ang isang drayber ay mapatunayang huwad ang kanyang lisensiya?

choices.en: His/her driver’s license shall be confiscated and he/she shall be disqualified from being granted a driver’s license and driving a motor vehicle for a period of one (1) year from the payment of monetary fine
choices.tl: Ang kaniyang lisensiya ay kukumpiskahin at hindi siya makakukuha ng lisensiya at makakapagmaneho ng sasakyang de-motor sa loob ng isang (1) taon matapos bayaran ang multa

choices.en: Imprisonment for six (6) months plus fine
choices.tl: Siya ay ikukulong sa loob ng anim (6) na buwan at pagmumultahin

choices.en: Banned from getting a driver's license for life
choices.tl: Habambuhay nang hindi makakukuha ng lisensiya

stem.en: What is the penalty if a driver is convicted of a crime while using a motor vehicle?
stem.tl: Ano ang magiging kaparusahan kung ang isang drayber ay nahatulan ng korte na gumawa ng krimen habang nagmamaneho?

choices.en: The DL will be revoked and the driver will be perpetually disqualified from applying for a license plus monetary fine
choices.tl: Multa at habambuhay na diskwalipikasyon sa pagkuha ng lisensya

choices.en: The DL will be suspended and the driver will pay a fine
choices.tl: Sususpindihin ang lisensya at siya ay pagmumultahin

stem.en: LTO rules and regulations prohibit drivers of public utility vehicles from:
stem.tl: Ang mga tuntunin at regulasyon ng LTO ay nagbabawal sa mga drayber ng mga public utility vehicle na:

choices.tl: Sumingil ng labis na pamasahe at magkaroon ng mabilis na metro ng taxi

choices.en: Cutting trip or going beyond authorized line
choices.tl: Cutting trip o wala sa ipinahihintulot na linya/ruta

choices.en: All of the answers are correct

stem.en: Who is a Professional Driver?
stem.tl: Sino ang propesyonal na drayber?

choices.tl: Isang eksperto at ekspiryensado sa pagmamaneho

choices.en: Any driver who can operate a specific motor vehicle category
choices.tl: Sinumang drayber na nakapagmamaneho ng isang uri ng sasakyang de-motor

choices.en: Any driver who has a qualification to drive a Private or For Hire Vehicle
choices.tl: Sinumang drayber na may kwalipikasyong magmaneho ng pribado o paupahang sasakyang de-motor

stem.en: How many days do you need to settle a traffic violation with LTO?
stem.tl: Ilang araw dapat asikasuhin sa LTO ang paglabag sa batas trapiko?

stem.en: What is the maximum validity of license that a driver may have if he/she has no traffic violation at the time of renewal?
stem.tl: Ilang taon ang maaaring ibigay na lisenysa sa isang drayber na walang traffic violation?

stem.en: Can a driver be given a 10-year validity license if he/she has traffic violation/s?
stem.tl: Maaari bang bigyan ng 10 taon na lisensya ang isang drayber kung ito ay mayroong huli o traffic violation?

choices.en: Yes - if all penalties are paid 15 days prior to renewal
choices.tl: Oo kung ang penalty ay nabayaran labinlimang araw bago mag-renew

stem.en: What is the allowed age to apply for a Non Professional driver's license?
stem.tl: Ano ang tamang edad upang magkaroon ng lisensya?

stem.en: Registration of motor vehicle may be suspended if:
stem.tl: Maaaring isuspinde ang rehistro ng sasakayan kung ito ay:

choices.en: Motor vehicle is found to be in conformity with regulations
choices.tl: Kung ang sasakyan ay maayos na nakapasa sa inspeksyon

choices.en: Motor vehicle is found to be unsightly
Motor vehicle is not registered to the driver at the time of apprehension
choices.tl: Ang sasakyan ay hindi rehistrado sa nagmamaneho sa oras ng pagkahuli nito

stem.en: Where do you need to display your plate number?
stem.tl: Saan dapat ilagay ang plaka ng isang sasakyan?

choices.en: One in front and one in the rear of the vehicle
choices.tl: Isa sa harap at isa sa likod ng sasakyan

choices.en: One in the front windshield and one at the back windshield
choices.tl: Isa sa harap na windshield at isa sa likurang salamin

stem.en: This traffic sign means "Yield the right of way"
stem.tl: Ang senyas trapiko na ito ay nangangahulugang “magbigay daan”:

stem.en: What is the main purpose of traffic laws, rules and regulations?
stem.tl: Ano ang pangunahing layunin ng mga batas, alituntunin at regulasyong pantrapiko?

choices.en: To generate revenues for the government
choices.tl: Upang kumita ng pera ang pamahalaan

choices.en: To put order on the road
choices.tl: Magkaroon ng maayos na galaw ang mga sasakyan at ang mga tumatawid sa kalsada

stem.en: Green light at an intersection means:
stem.tl: Ang kulay berdeng ilaw sa isang interseksiyon ay nangangahulugan na:

choices.en: Pedestrians are allowed to cross all pedestrian lanes
choices.tl: Pinahihintulutang tumawid sa lahat ng tawiran ang mga tao

choices.en: Pedestrians are not allowed to cross all pedestrian lanes
choices.tl: Hindi pinahihintulutang tumawid sa lahat ng tawiran ang mga tao

choices.en: The vehicles on the other street are stopped
choices.tl: Ang mga sasakyan sa kabilang kalsada ay nakahinto

stem.en: Flashing yellow light means:
stem.tl: Ang kumikisap-kisap na dilaw na ilaw pantrapiko ay nangangahulugan na:

choices.tl: Bagalan ang takbo at dumiretso nang may pag-iingat

choices.en: You have the right of way over a flashing yellow light
choices.tl: Ikaw ang may higit na karapatan kaysa sa kumikisap-kisap na dilaw na ilaw

choices.en: Vehicles will be crossing from the other side
choices.tl: May mga sasakyang tatawid mula sa kabila

stem.en: Parking is allowed if the vehicle is:
stem.tl: Pinahihintulutan ang pagparada kung ang sasakyan ay:

choices.en: Beyond 4 meters of a fire hydrant
Within 3 meters of the intersection of curve lines
choices.tl: Nasa loob ng 3 metro ng interseksiyon ng mga linyang kurbada

stem.en: Normally, on a two-lane road, overtaking is allowed at the:
stem.tl: Sa kalsadang pandalawahang sasakyan, ang pag-overtake ay pinahihintulutan sa:

choices.en: Shoulder or pavement of the road
choices.tl: Kanang bahagi ng kalsada o bangketa

choices.en: Blind curve with a yellow solid line
choices.tl: Kurbada/blind curve na may buong linyang dilaw

stem.en: When do you have to make a complete full stop?
stem.tl: Kailan ka dapat ganap na huminto?

choices.tl: Kapag may dilaw na ilaw na kumikisap-kisap

stem.en: The proper hand signal for a right turn is:
stem.tl: Ang tamang senyas ng kamay kapag kumakanan ay:

choices.tl: Ang kaliwang braso nakaturo sa kaliwa
Ang kaliwang braso ay nakaturo sa itaas

choices.en: Left arm held down, hand pointing at ground
choices.tl: Ang kaliwang braso ay nakapababa, na ang kamay ay nakaturo sa ibaba

stem.en: Single white broken line on a 2-way road means:
stem.tl: Ang putting putol-putol na linya sa kalsadang salubungan ay nangangahulugan na:

choices.en: Passing or overtaking can be made anytime
choices.tl: Ang paglampas o ang pag-overtake ay maaaring gawin anumang oras

choices.en: It separates traffic moving in opposite directions
choices.tl: Hinihiwalay nito ang pagdaloy ng mga sasakyan sa magkabilang direksiyon

stem.en: What is the meaning of double solid yellow line?
stem.tl: Ano ang kahulugan ng dobleng linyang dilaw?

choices.en: Crossing/traversing or overtaking is not allowed
choices.tl: Ang pagtawid o paglusot ay hindi pinahihintulutan

stem.en: Upon approaching an intersection marked with a yield sign, you are required to
stem.tl: Kapag papalapit sa interseksiyong may karatulang nagsasabing magbigay daan (yield), kailangang

choices.en: Slowdown, then enter the intersection when the way is clear
choices.tl: Bagalan ang takbo at pagkatapos ay pumasok sa interseksiyon kung ligtas

stem.en: The holder of a driver's license shall entitle him/her to operate:
stem.tl: Ang lisensiya ay nagpapahintulot sa drayber na magmaneho ng:

choices.en: Motor vehicle/s specified in the license only
choices.tl: Mga sasakyan lamang na nakatakda sa lisensiya

stem.en: When may you lend your driver's license?
stem.tl: Kailan mo maaaring ipahiram ang iyong lisensiya?

choices.en: To another person who is learning to drive

choices.tl: Sa oras ng kagipitan o emergency

stem.en: At an intersection without stop or yield signs, two cars approach at right angles to each other at almost the same time. Which driver must yield?
stem.tl: Sa interseksiyon na walang mga karatulang nagsasabing huminto o magbigay ng daan, dalawang sasakyan ang sabay na dumating sa anggulong 90 digri sa isa’t isa. Sinong drayber ang dapat magbigay daan?

choices.tl: Ang drayber ng sasakyan sa kanan
Ang drayber ng sasakyan sa kaliwa

choices.en: Either of the driver has the first right-of-way
choices.tl: Alinman sa dalawa ay may unang karapatan

stem.en: Is it allowed to drive a motorcycle in a public road pending release of the Certificate of Registration?
stem.tl: Maaari bang gamitin sa pampublikong daan ang motorsiklo kung ito ay wala pang rehistro?

choices.en: Yes, if travel authority is given by the dealer
choices.tl: Oo, kung ang pagbiyahe ay may pahintulot ang dealer nito

stem.en: Which of the following statement is true?
stem.tl: Alin sa mga sumusunod na pahayag ang totoo?

choices.en: MT not allowed to drive AT
choices.tl: MT ay hindi pwedeng magmaneho ng AT
AT ay pwedeng magmaneho ng MT
MT ay pwedeng magmaneho ng AT

stem.en: Can you drive a motorcycle if your license bears DL Code B ?
stem.tl: Maaari ka bang magmaneho ng motorsiklo kung ang iyong lisensya ay may DL Code B ?

choices.en: No, unless authorized by a traffic enforcer
choices.tl: Hindi, maliban kung pinahintulutan ng traffic enforcer

stem.en: Identify this traffic sign:
stem.tl: Tukuyin kung anong senyas ito:

stem.en: Identify this traffic sign:
stem.tl: Tukuyin kung anong senyas ito:

stem.en: Identify this traffic sign:
stem.tl: Tukuyin kung anong senyas ito:

stem.en: Identify this traffic sign:
stem.tl: Tukuyin kung anong senyas ito:

choices.en: No entry for all types of vehicle
choices.tl: Bawal pumasok ang lahat ng uri ng sasakyan

stem.en: Identify this traffic sign:
stem.tl: Tukuyin kung anong senyas ito:

stem.en: What is the meaning of this traffic sign?
stem.tl: Ano ang ibig sabihin ng senyas na ito?

stem.en: Drinking alcohol before driving is one of the major causes of vehicular road crash because when a driver is drunk, he/she is:
stem.tl: Ang pag-inom ng mga inuming nakalalasing bago magmaneho ay isa sa mga pangunahing sanhi ng aksidente sapagkat kapag lasing ang isang drayber, siya ay:

choices.en: Arrogant, talkative and lacks judgment and reflexes to perform safely
choices.tl: Mayabang, madaldal, wala sa tamang desisyon at hindi makakilos nang ligtas

choices.en: Calm, relaxed and able to perform accordingly
Able to talk intelligently and give appearance of sobriety

stem.en: The Temporary Operator's Permit (TOP) authorizes the apprehended driver to operate a motor vehicle for a period not exceeding:
stem.tl: Pinahihintulutan ng Temporary Operator's Permit (TOP) ang nahuling drayber na magmaneho ng sasakyan sa loob ng:

stem.en: What is the maximum penalty for driving under the influence of liquor or prohibited drugs?
stem.tl: Ano ang pinakamabigat na kaparusahan sa pagmamaneho nang nakainom o naka-droga?

stem.en: What is the meaning of a blue traffic light?
stem.tl: Ano ang kahulugan ng asul na ilaw trapiko?

choices.tl: Walang kulay asul na ilaw trapiko

stem.en: Motorcycle riders must consider safety and exercise due care. To do so, they are required to wear
stem.tl: Ang mga nagmamaneho ng motorsiklo ay dapat na laging isinasaalangalang ang lubos na pag-iingat at kaligtasan. Kaya kailangan nilang magsuot ng

stem.en: What should you do when another vehicle is following you too close?
stem.tl: Ano ang gagawin mo kung ang sumusunod na sasakyan sa iyo ay masyadong nakatutok?

choices.en: Speed up to start a road race
choices.tl: Bilisan pa ang takbo at makipagkarerahan

choices.en: Slow down gradually and give him the signal to overtake you
choices.tl: Unti-unti mong bagalan ang takbo at senyasan siyang mag-overtake

stem.en: Before changing lanes in traffic, aside from giving signal and checking your side and rearview mirrors, what else do you need to do?
stem.tl: Bago lumipat ng lane, bukod sa dapat munang sumenyas, tumingin sa mga gilid at rear view mirror, ano pa ang dapat mong gawin?

choices.en: Turn your head to check other vehicles beside your car

stem.en: When approaching a sharp curve of the highway, you should:
stem.tl: Kapag papalapit sa isang biglaang pagliko/kurbada, dapat:

choices.en: Reduce speed before entering the curve
Increase speed while negotiating the curve
Apply your brakes abruptly while taking the curve

stem.en: Night driving is difficult. We should do the following when a vehicle comes towards us at night:
stem.tl: Mahirap magmaneho kung gabi kaya dapat gawin ang sumusunod kapag may kasalubong na sasakyan:

choices.en: Dim your lights by switching to low beam
choices.tl: Hinaan ang ilaw sa pamamagitan ng pagsindi sa low beam

choices.en: Brighten your light by switching to high beam
choices.tl: Lakasan ang ilaw sa pamamagitan ng pagsindi sa high beam
Sindihan ang mga headlight, on and off

stem.en: At night, when approaching a curve or intersection with poor visibility, be sure to:
stem.tl: Sa gabi, kapag papalapit sa isang kurbada o interseksiyon na mahirap makita ang kasalubong, siguraduhing:

choices.en: Switch off your headlights to enable oncoming motorists to see you
choices.tl: Patayin ang headlight upang makita ng mga motorista ang iyong sasakyan

choices.en: Flash your headlights to let pedestrians and oncoming motorists know that you are heading into the curve or intersection
choices.tl: Sumenyas sa pamamagitan ng pagpatay-sindi ng headlight upang malaman ng mga tao at kasalubong na motorista na papalapit ka sa kurbada o interseksiyon

choices.en: Switch on your interior lights to enable oncoming vehicles to see your vehicle
choices.tl: I-switch ang mga ilaw sa loob ng sasakyan upang makita ng mga makakasalubong ang iyong sasakyan

stem.en: What is the best safety rule when driving a motor vehicle?
stem.tl: Ano ang pinakaligtas na alituntunin habang ikaw ay nagmamaneho?

choices.tl: Huwag ipilit ang karapatan sa daan

choices.en: Blow your horn to assert your right-of-way
choices.tl: Bumusina upang maigiit ang iyong karapatan sa daan
Laging igiit ang karapatan sa daan

stem.en: A blind spot is either at your right or left that you do not see on your side mirror. What should you do before backing-up?
stem.tl: Ang blind spot ay nasa awing kanan o kaliwa na hindi mo nakikita sa iyong side mirror. Ano ang dapat mong gawin bago umatras?

choices.en: Turn your head to see that the way is clear
choices.tl: Lumingon upang matiyak na walang nakaharang sa daan

choices.en: Turn your wheel all the way to the right and pull up
choices.tl: Ipaling nang sagad ang gulong sa kanan bago huminto

choices.en: Turn your wheel all the way to the left and pull up
choices.tl: Ipaling nang sagad ang gulong sa kaliwa bago huminto

stem.en: Road crash can be avoided if the drivers:
stem.tl: Maiiwasan ang mga road crash kung:

choices.en: Follow traffic signs and pertinent traffic rules and regulations
choices.tl: Susundin ang mga senyas pantrapiko at mga alituntunin at regulasyon ng batas trapiko
Ganap na hindi susundin ang mga batas trapiko
Ang mga drayber ay walang alam sa batas trapiko

stem.en: What should you do whenever you are driving on a highway with a lot of potholes?
stem.tl: Ano ang dapat mong gawin kapag nagmamaneho sa highway na maraming lubak?

stem.en: Sometimes, a driver passes through a busy street with so many pedestrians. Which of the following should a driver do?
stem.tl: Kung minsan, dumaraan ang drayber sa isang kalye na maraming sasakyan at maraming tao. Alin sa mga sumusunod ang dapat niyang gawin?

choices.en: Slow down and check for safety when passing through
choices.tl: Bagalan ang takbo at tingnan kung ligtas ang pagdaan

stem.en: Driving in heavy rains can be extremely dangerous due to limited visibility. What should you do?
stem.tl: Ang pagmamaneho kapag malakas ang ulan ay lubhang mapanganib dahil hindi makakakita ng maigi. Ano ang dapat mong gawin?

choices.en: When you cannot see more than 20 meters in front of you, turn on your hazard lights/headlights and look for a safe place to park
choices.tl: Kapag hindi makakita nang mahigit sa 20 metro sa harapan mo, i-switch ang hazard lights/headlight at maghanap ng ligtas na mapaparadahan

choices.en: Turn on your headlights and slow down or park at a safe place if situation is risky
choices.tl: I-switch ang headlights at bagalan ang takbo o huminto sa isang ligtas na lugar kung ang sitwasyon ay mapanganib

choices.en: Turn on your hazard lights, blow your horn and continue driving
choices.tl: I-switch ang hazard lights, bumusina at magpatuloy sa pagmamaneho

stem.en: If you see a ball coming from behind a parked vehicle, it is more likely that a kid is following it. What will you do?
stem.tl: Kung may nakita kang bola na mula sa likuran ng isang nakaparadang sasakyan, malamang na may batang sumusunod dito. Ano ang gagawin mo?

choices.en: Blow your horn and maintain your speed
choices.tl: Bumusina at panatilihin ang bilis ng takbo

stem.en: What should you do when you see a traffic sign "ACCIDENT PRONE AREA"?
stem.tl: Ano ang dapat mong gawin kung nakakita ka ng senyas trapiko na nagsasabing “ACCIDENT PRONE AREA”?

choices.en: Slow down and be more alert than usual
choices.tl: Bagalan ang takbo at higit na maging alisto

choices.en: Blow your horn and resume your normal speed
choices.tl: Bumusina at panatilihin ang normal mong bilis

stem.en: Which of the following is not a safe place to overtake?
stem.tl: Alin sa mga sumusunod ang hindi ligtas na lugar sa pag-overtake/paglusot?

choices.en: When approaching a crest or upon a curve
choices.tl: Kapag papalapit sa paahon na lugar o kurbada

stem.en: Disregarding traffic lights during late hours of the night could:
stem.tl: Ang pagwawalang-bahala sa mga ilaw trapiko kapag gabi na ay:

choices.tl: Makatutulong upang higit kang maging magaling na drayber

choices.en: Involve you in a fatal road crash
choices.tl: Maaaring magresulta sa aksidente at kamatayan
Makatitipid sa konsumo ng gasolina o krudo

stem.en: A good driver must meet one's social responsibilities of caring for others by:
stem.tl: Ang maayos na drayber ay matutugunan ang responsabilidad sa lipunan sa pamamagitan nang:

choices.en: Driving noisily to attract attention of residents along the road
choices.tl: Pagmaneho nang maingay upang mapansin ng mga residente

choices.en: Exercising care for other pedestrians and vehicles around
choices.tl: Pagsasaalang-alang sa mga tumatawid at mga sasakyang nakapaligid

choices.en: Blowing one's horn every now and then to scare passers-by
choices.tl: Maya’t mayang pagbusina upang takutin ang mga naglalakad

stem.en: When the vehicle you are driving runs off the road or hits an electric post or a parked car, the most probable reason is:
stem.tl: Kapag ang minamaneho mong sasakyan ay lumihis sa kalsada o tumama sa poste o nakaparadang sasakyan, malamang na ang dahilan nito ay:

choices.en: You are driving too fast and you lost control of your vehicle
choices.tl: Mabilis ang takbo at nawalan ka ng kontrol sa sasakyan

stem.en: If your vehicle broke down on the road, what should you do?
stem.tl: Kapag nasiraan ka ng sasakyan sa daan, ano ang gagawin mo?

choices.en: Leave the vehicle and call for a mechanic
choices.tl: Iwan ang sasakyan at tumawag ng mekaniko

choices.en: Switch on hazard warning lights and display an Early Warning Device (EWD) at least four (4) meters behind the stalled vehicle
choices.tl: Pailawin ang hazard lights at maglagay ng EWD na hindi bababa sa 4 na metro sa likod ng sasakyan

choices.en: Turn off the engine and call for a mechanic
choices.tl: Patayin ang makina at tumawag ng mekaniko

stem.en: What is the primary responsibility of a driver in times of a road crash?
stem.tl: Ano ang pangunahing responsibilidad ng isang drayber sa isang aksidente?

stem.en: Which of the following is a quality of a defensive driver?
stem.tl: Alin sa mga sumusunod ang kwalipikasyon ng isang maayos na drayber?

choices.en: Drivers who know how to properly use clutch and brake pedals while driving
choices.tl: Mga drayber na marunong gumamit ng clutch at preno habang nagmamaneho

choices.en: Drivers using basic knowledge of vehicle maintenance
choices.tl: Mga drayber na may kaalaman sa pagmintina ng sasakyan

choices.en: Driver who continues to drive even with flat tires to avoid an impounding ticket
choices.tl: Nagpapatuloy magmaneho kahit flat ang gulong para maiwasang ma-impound

stem.en: Which one is correct road discipline?
stem.tl: Alin ang tamang disiplina sa kalsada?

choices.en: Hiding from traffic enforcers during oplan sita
choices.tl: Magtago sa mga enforcers sa panahon ng oplan sita

choices.en: Following the advice of the elderly
choices.tl: Sundin ang mga payo ng mga matatanda

choices.en: Knowing and abiding by the traffic rules and regulations
choices.tl: Alamin at sundin ang mga batas trapiko

stem.en: How can you overcome stress?
stem.tl: Paano mo malalampasan ang stress o tensyon?

choices.en: Stop, get out, shout at anybody and engage in a fight
choices.tl: Huminto, bumaba, sumigaw kahit kanino at maghamon ng away

choices.en: Take a deep breath, sit comfortably, listen to soothing music, allow enough space in front and provide extra travel time
choices.tl: Huminga ng malalim, maupo nang maayos, makinig sa nakakaaliw na tugtog, magbigay ng distansiya at extra time

choices.en: Drive faster than allowed, listen to loud music and provoke other motorists
choices.tl: Bilisan ang takbo, makinig sa maiingay na tugtog at maghamon ng away

stem.en: What may happen if a driver failed to overcome stress?
stem.tl: Ano ang maaaring mangyari kung ang isang drayber ay hindi malampasan ang stress o tensyon?

stem.en: Which of the following actions may result to road rage?
stem.tl: Alin sa mga sumusunod ang maaaring mag resulta sa away kalsada?

choices.en: Following a vehicle with enough space to maneuver
choices.tl: Pagsunod sa sasakyan na may tamang agwat

choices.en: Cutting off other vehicles or following too close
choices.tl: Pag-cut sa ibang motorista at pagtutok sa mga ito

choices.en: Allowing other motorists to overtake with ease
choices.tl: Pagbigay daan para makapag-overtake nang maayos

stem.en: What is the ultimate result of a road rage?
stem.tl: Ano ang pinakamasamang mangyayari sa isang away kalsada?

stem.en: If you feel drowsy while driving, it is important that you:
stem.tl: Kung nakakaramdam ka ng pagka-antok habang nagmamaneho, mahalaga na ikaw ay:

choices.en: Park at a safe place, and take a short break before proceeding
choices.tl: Magparada sa ligtas na lugar at magpahinga bago magpatuloy

choices.en: Speed up to reach your destination faster
choices.tl: Bilisan ang takbo upang makarating nang mabilis

choices.en: Stop driving, switch on hazard lights and take a nap
choices.tl: Huminto, i-switch hazard lights at magpahinga

stem.en: Can a driver allow a cyclist to hitch on his vehicle?
stem.tl: Maaari bang pahintulutan ng drayber ang siklista na sumabit sa kanyang sasakyan?

choices.en: No, especially without permission from an enforcer
choices.tl: Hindi, lalo at walang permiso sa traffic enforcer

stem.en: What is the first thing to do if you experience a tire blowout?
stem.tl: Ano ang una mong dapat gawin kung ikaw ay nakaranas ng tire blowout?

choices.en: Don't step on the brakes; focus on the steering wheel
choices.tl: Huwag tapakan ang preno; magpokus sa manibela

stem.en: What is the main purpose of having a vehicle undergo regular vehicle maintenance inspection?
stem.tl: Ano ang pangunahing layunin ng regular na pag inspeksyon ng isang sasakyan?

choices.en: To verify the chassis and engine numbers of the vehicle
choices.tl: Para siyasatin ang mga numero ng chassis at motor

choices.en: To check the roadworthiness of the vehicle
choices.tl: Para tingnan ang kaayusan ng sasakyan
Para tingnan ang pagganap ng drayber

stem.en: When do you need to follow the traffic rules and regulations?
stem.tl: Kailan mo dapat sundin ang mga batas trapiko?

stem.en: Under R.A. 8750, children must be properly restrained if they are:
stem.tl: Ayon sa R.A. 8750, ang mga bata ay dapat nakaupo sa aprobadong child restraint kung sila ay:

stem.en: In driving, the most important sense the driver needs is:
stem.tl: Sa pagmamaneho, ang pinakamahalagang pandama na kailangan ng drayber ay:

stem.en: Identify this traffic sign:
stem.tl: Tukuyin kung anong senyas ito:

choices.en: Driving speed to beat the traffic
choices.tl: Bilis ng pagtakbo upang maiwasan ang trapik

choices.en: Distance of the next intersection is 30 km
choices.tl: Distansiya ng susunod na interseksyon ay 30 km
Hanggang 30 kph lang ang bilis ng pagtakbo

stem.en: Identify this traffic sign:
stem.tl: Tukuyin kung anong senyas ito:

choices.tl: Ikaw ay may karapatan sa daan

stem.en: What is the meaning of yellow painted curb?
stem.tl: Ano ang ibig sabihin ng nakapintang dilaw?

stem.en: What do you need to do upon parking and getting out of the vehicle?
stem.tl: Ano ang dapat mong gawin pagkatapos mag-park at bago bumaba ng sasakyan?

stem.en: What do rumble strips on the road indicate?
stem.tl: Ano ang layunin ng rumble strips sa kalsada?

choices.en: To stop at once and wait for a go signal upon reaching an intersection
choices.tl: Huminto agad at maghintay ng go signal pagkarating sa interseksyon

choices.en: To be aware of the speed approaching obstructions or intersections
choices.tl: Para malaman/maalala ang takbo habang papalapit sa obstruction o intersection

stem.en: What is the required color of headlights?
stem.tl: Ano ang dapat na kulay ng headlight?

stem.en: What is the required color of brake lights?
stem.tl: Ano ang dapat na kulay ng ilaw ng preno?

stem.en: What are the requirements for motor vehicle registration?
stem.tl: Ano ang mga kailangan para sa pagpaparehistro ng sasakyan?

choices.en: LTO inspection of the vehicle and emission test compliance
choices.tl: Inspeksiyon ng sasakyan at emission test sa LTO

stem.en: When do you need to use your seat belt?
stem.tl: Kailan mo kailangan dapat gamitin ang seat belt?

choices.en: When driving on a national road
choices.tl: Kung magmamaneho sa malalaking pampublikong daan

choices.en: While the engine is running and before moving off
choices.tl: Habang nakaandar ang makina at bago umabante

stem.en: What is the primary objective of the Seat Belt Act?
stem.tl: Ano ang pangunahing layunin ng batas patungkol sa paggamit ng seat belt?

choices.en: To restrict the driver in times of road rage
choices.tl: Upang mapigil ang drayber na masangkot sa away kalsada

choices.en: To complete the practical driving course
choices.tl: Para kumpletuhin ang practical driving course

choices.en: To secure and safeguard the passengers and drivers of motor vehicles
choices.tl: Para sa seguridad ng mga pasahero at mga drayber

stem.en: What is the maximum height that a driver can install his mobile phone from the base of the dashboard?
stem.tl: Ilang pulgada maaaring maglagay ng telepono mula sa base ng dashboard ng sasakyan?

stem.en: Under R.A. No. 11229, what is the allowable age that a child may sit in front passenger seat of a car?
stem.tl: Anong edad maaaring sumakay sa harapan ang isang bata na naaayon sa RA 11229?

stem.en: What is the height requirement for a child to be exempted to use a child restraint system?
stem.tl: Ano ang taas ng isang bata upang ito ay hindi na kailangang gumamit ng child restraint system?

stem.en: Can an expired child restraint system be used when it still looks in good shape?
stem.tl: Maaari bang gamitin ang isang child restraint system kung ito ay expired na kahit maayos pa ang kondisyon?

choices.en: Yes, provided that it is allowed by traffic enforcers
choices.tl: Oo, basta't pinapayagan ng traffic enforcer

stem.en: When does a driver need to wear a helmet when riding a motorcycle?
stem.tl: Kailan dapat gamitin ng drayber ang kanyang helmet?

choices.en: For long or short drives and in any type of road or highway
choices.tl: Para sa mahaba o maiksing biyahe at anumang uri ng kalsada

stem.en: What type of helmet should a rider must use?
stem.tl: Anong klaseng helmet ang dapat gamitin ng rider ng motorsiklo?

choices.en: Standard motorcycle helmet compliant to specifications of LTO
choices.tl: Standard motorcycle helmet na sumunod sa regulasyon ng LTO

choices.en: Standard motorcycle helmet compliant to specifications of DENR
choices.tl: Standard motorcycle helmet na sumunod sa panuntunan ng DENR

choices.en: Standard motorcycle helmet compliant to specifications of DTI
choices.tl: Standard motorcycle helmet na naaayon sa panuntunan ng DTI

stem.en: Who are responsible if a motorcycle was used in the commission of a crime?
stem.tl: Sino ang may pananagutan kung ang isang motorsiklo ay ginamit sa krimen?

stem.en: Under the Children's Safety on Motorcycles Act, a child below 18 years old can't ride in a two-wheeled motorcycle on public roads unless:
stem.tl: Ayon sa Children's Safety on Motorcycles Act, ang batang wala pang 18 taong gulang ay hindi maaaring sumakay ng motorsiklo sa pampublikong kalsada maliban kung:

choices.en: The child can comfortably reach his/her feet on the standard foot peg, can grasp the driver's waist, and is wearing a standard protective helmet.
choices.tl: Maabot ng bata ang foot peg, kaya niyang masalikop ang baywang ng drayber, at nakasuot siya ng karaniwang proteksiyon na helmet.

choices.en: There is a high density of fast moving vehicles or where a speed limit of more than 60 kph is imposed.
choices.tl: Maraming mabibilis na sasakyan o higit 60 kph ang speed limit.

choices.en: The driver can grasp the child's waist sitting in front and the child is wearing a standard protective helmet.
choices.tl: Kayang mayakap ng drayber ang baywang ng batang nasa harap at nakasuot ang bata ng karaniwang helmet.

stem.en: What is the violation of a driver overtaking at an intersection having a one lane direction?
stem.tl: Ano ang maaaring maging traffic violation ng drayber na nag-overtake sa interseksyon na may isang lane lamang papunta sa iisang direksyon?

stem.en: When are you allowed to pick up passengers at a pedestrian lane?
stem.tl: Kailan ka maaaring magsakay ng pasahero sa isang pook tawiran?

choices.en: When traffic enforcers are not looking
choices.tl: Kung hindi nakatingin ang traffic enforcers

choices.en: When a passenger is already waiting
Loading and unloading at a pedestrian lane is not allowed
choices.tl: Kailanman ay hindi pinahihintulutan ang pagsakay/pagbaba sa pook tawiran

stem.en: Is a driver allowed to load cargo more than the vehicle's registered load capacity?
stem.tl: Maaari bang magkarga ng kargamento na lampas sa itinakdang timbang ng sasakyan?

choices.en: Yes, if the cargo is fragile or perishable
choices.tl: Oo, kung madaling mabasag o nabubulok

stem.en: Where can you contest an alleged traffic violation?
stem.tl: Saan mo maaaring ireklamo o i-contest ang pagkakahuli sa iyo?

choices.en: At the traffic adjudication office concerned
choices.tl: Sa tanggapan ng adyudikasyon na may sakop

choices.en: On the street, before the traffic enforcer leaves
choices.tl: Sa kalsada bago umalis ang enforcer

stem.en: Who has the authority to confiscate a driver's license during a normal traffic violation?
stem.tl: Sa normal na traffic violation, sino ang maaaring kumumpiska ng lisensya?

choices.en: LTO Law Enforcement Officers or LTO Deputized Agents
choices.tl: Mga LTO enforcers o deputized agents ng LTO

choices.en: Anybody, as long as the violation is within R.A. No. 4136
choices.tl: Kahit sino basta sakop ng R.A. 4136

choices.en: Anybody, if the enforcer is a permanent government employee
choices.tl: Kahit sino basta permanenteng empleyado ng gobyerno

stem.en: A 30-day suspension of the driver's license shall be imposed if:
stem.tl: Ang 30-araw na suspensyon ng lisensya sa pagmamaneho ay ipapataw kung:

choices.en: The traffic violation committed is grave
The driver fails to pay the corresponding penalty within 15 days
choices.tl: Hindi nabayaran ang multa sa loob ng 15 araw

choices.en: The driver fails to pay the fine within 72 hours
choices.tl: Hindi nabayaran ang multa sa loob ng 72 oras

stem.en: What does this hand signal mean when you are coming from the roadside and your signal is malfunctioning?
stem.tl: Ano ang ibig sabihin ng senyas kamay na ito kapag sira ang signal light mo?

stem.en: What should be the appropriate action when you see this traffic sign? “Slow Down – Accident Prone Area”
stem.tl: Ano ang dapat mong gawin kung makikita ang karatulang ito? “Slow Down – Accident Prone Area”

choices.en: Slow down and be more alert than usual
Blow your horn and resume your normal speed
choices.tl: Bumusina at ituloy ang normal na bilis

stem.en: Where do you usually see this traffic sign?
stem.tl: Saan madalas makita ang mga ganitong senyas trapiko?

choices.en: At the column of a footbridge
choices.tl: Sa poste ng tawiran ng tao

stem.en: What should a law enforcer do upon seizing a motorcycle from a traffic offender?
stem.tl: Ano ang dapat gawin ng law enforcer kung makumpiska ang isang motorsiklo?

choices.en: Send the motorcycle to the impounding area
choices.tl: Dalhin ang motorsiklo sa impounding area

stem.en: What does the law require you to do upon approaching an intersection with a STOP sign?
stem.tl: Ayon sa batas, ano ang dapat mong gawin kapag paparating sa interseksyon na may STOP sign?

choices.en: Slow down and proceed when it is safe
choices.tl: Bagalan ang takbo at dumiretso kung ligtas

choices.en: Stop and proceed when it is safe
choices.tl: Huminto at dumiretso lamang kung ligtas

stem.en: After passing or overtaking another vehicle, you can safely move back into your original lane if:
stem.tl: Pagkatapos lumampas/overtake, maaari nang bumalik sa orihinal na lane kung:

choices.en: The driver you passed honks his horn
choices.tl: Bumusina ang drayber na nilampasan mo

choices.en: You can see in the rear-view mirror the overtaken car
choices.tl: Natatanaw mo sa rear-view mirror ang nilampasang sasakyan

choices.en: You can see in the side-view mirror the overtaken car
choices.tl: Natatanaw mo sa side-view mirror ang nilampasang sasakyan

stem.en: Drivers moving slower than other motorists should use the:
stem.tl: Ang mga motorista na mas mabagal kaysa iba ay dapat na nasa:

choices.tl: Lane sa gawing labas o dulong kanan
Lane sa gawing loob o dulong kaliwa

stem.en: Some signs are called “lane-use” signs. They direct you into the correct lane as you reach the intersection. They are usually seen:
stem.tl: Ang lane-use signs ay gumagabay sa tamang lane habang papalapit sa interseksyon. Kadalasan ito ay makikita:

stem.en: If you encounter an emergency vehicle with sirens on, what should you do?
stem.tl: Kapag nakasabay mo ang sasakyang pang-emergency na nakabukas ang sirena, ano ang dapat mong gawin?

choices.en: Pull over to the left or right side and give way
choices.tl: Tumabi sa kaliwa o kanan at magbigay daan

stem.en: A driver while on a highway shall yield the right of way to:
stem.tl: Kapag nasa highway, magpapadaan ang drayber sa:

choices.en: Pedestrians crossing at an intersection regulated by a traffic enforcer
choices.tl: Mga tumatawid sa interseksyon na may traffic enforcer

choices.en: Vehicles about to enter the highway

stem.en: With Anti-lock Braking System (ABS) installed, what should you do if you have to stop suddenly?
stem.tl: Kapag may ABS ang sasakyan at kailangan mong biglaang huminto, ano ang dapat mong gawin?

choices.en: Apply brakes gently with steady pressure
choices.tl: Unti-unting magpreno nang may steady pressure

stem.en: Your speed while driving at night should depend on:
stem.tl: Ang bilis ng pagmamaneho sa gabi ay nakasalalay sa:

choices.en: The physical/mental condition and skill of the driver
choices.tl: Pisikal/mental na kondisyon at kakayahan ng drayber

choices.en: Roadworthiness of the vehicle and weather condition
choices.tl: Kaayusan ng sasakyan at lagay ng panahon

choices.en: All of the answers are correct

stem.en: The most effective way to deal with a tailgater is to:
stem.tl: Ang pinakamabisang gawin sa isang tumututok ay:

choices.en: Ignore him but do not allow him to get away
choices.tl: Huwag pansinin pero huwag siyang hayaang makalayo

choices.en: Slow down and let him pass
choices.tl: Bagalan ang takbo at bigyan daan

choices.en: Increase your speed and be alert on your brakes
choices.tl: Bilisan ang takbo at maging alisto sa pagpreno

stem.en: What should you do when an incoming vehicle is forced to cross the centerline to avoid hitting another vehicle which suddenly changed lane?
stem.tl: Ano ang dapat mong gawin kung ang paparating na sasakyan ay napilitang tumawid sa centerline para umiwas sa sasakyang biglang lumipat ng lane?

choices.en: Ignore it because you have the right-of-way
choices.tl: Huwag pansinin dahil ikaw ang may karapatan

choices.en: Blow your horn and turn on your headlight
Be alert, be prepared to slow down, and give way
choices.tl: Maging alisto, maghandang bagalan ang takbo, at magbigay daan

stem.en: What may happen if the driver deliberately disregards a regulatory traffic sign?
stem.tl: Ano ang maaaring mangyari kung ipagwalang-bahala ng drayber ang regulatory traffic sign?

stem.en: When you want to shift to a higher gear to speed up, and a car in the opposite direction crosses quickly to your lane, what will you do?
stem.tl: Kapag nais mong magpalit sa mas mataas na gear para bumilis, at may sasakyan sa kasalungat na direksyon na mabilis na tumatawid sa lane mo, ano ang gagawin mo?

choices.en: Be alert, stop and give way to the car crossing
choices.tl: Maging alerto, huminto at magbigay daan

stem.en: Who will win between two parties if they failed to overcome stress?
stem.tl: Sino ang mananalo kung ang bawat partido ay hindi malampasan ang stress o tensyon?

choices.en: Neither the aggressor nor the victim

stem.en: Driving along an open road, a PWD in a wheelchair abruptly crosses the road. How do you prevent yourself hitting the PWD?
stem.tl: Habang nagmamaneho, may PWD na naka-wheelchair na biglang tumawid. Paano mo maiiwasang tamaan?

choices.en: Hold the steering wheel and shift to an open space to avoid the PWD
choices.tl: Kumapit sa manibela at lumipat sa ligtas na espasyo upang umiwas

stem.en: Can a driver who had the opportunity to avoid a road crash and neglected to avoid such road crash be jointly held liable?
stem.tl: May pananagutan ba ang drayber na may pagkakataong maiwasan ang aksidente pero hindi niya ginawa?

stem.en: When parking, how many meters is allowed from the location of a fire hydrant?
stem.tl: Ilang metro ang layo na maaaring pumarada ang sasakyan mula sa fire hydrant?

stem.en: Driving a car, which lane should you use in a three (3) lane expressway during normal situation?
stem.tl: Anong lane ang dapat gamitin sa three-lane expressway kung normal na sitwasyon?

stem.en: Is a driver allowed to drive on the transition lines?
stem.tl: Maaari bang magmaneho sa mga transition lines sa kalsada?

choices.en: Yes, if traffic flow is heavy

stem.en: What should you do if a pedestrian is crossing a nonsignalized pedestrian lane?
stem.tl: Ano ang dapat mong gawin kung may tumatawid sa tawiran na walang senyas trapiko?

choices.en: Stop and let the pedestrian cross
Drive faster and do not wait
